scope_summary: Find one recent failed ASMS shell-transition candidate and compare it to the successful SuiteLoginSessionValidation-to-home.php baseline at 2026-03-26 05:29:53-05:29:56 EDT for session i88p8vb1s79p6nb0f4o2jkpb07. Use Apache ssl_access_log, Metro localhost_access_log.txt, and relevant PHP code paths. Prefer a failure where SuiteLoginSessionValidation appears but home.php is absent, non-200, or the immediate shell bootstrap is missing or degraded. Identify the first missing or degraded request relative to the successful baseline. Do not mutate appliance state.
